audit_period: 8/18/2025 (Certification Agreement date; audit period not explicitly stated)
opinion: Not yet issued — this document is the Certification Agreement Form, not the final audit report/certificate

system_description.overview: Soolv AS operates a cloud-based talent intelligence service that enables businesses to identify and engage top candidates. The platform securely collects, analyzes, and delivers actionable insights to improve talent acquisition and workforce planning.

products.Talent Intelligence Platform: Cloud-based service for talent acquisition and workforce planning that collects, analyzes, and delivers actionable insights on candidates

network_architecture.topology: No diagram described in report. This document is a certification agreement, not the full audit report.

notable_controls: Document is a Certification Agreement Form with Terms & Conditions, not the actual ISO 27001 audit report or Statement of Applicability (SoA). No individual controls are listed or tested in this document.
Statement of Applicability Version 1.0 is referenced but not included in this PDF.
Total audit mandays for the certification cycle: 9 (Stage-1: 2, Stage-2: 3, Surveillance-1: 2, Surveillance-2: 2)

infrastructure.rationale: No infrastructure details disclosed. Only 'cloud-based' is mentioned with zero specifics on provider, regions, or architecture.

application_architecture.rationale: No application architecture details disclosed. The scope mentions 'proprietary technology, data processing infrastructure, and analytics tools' but provides no specifics.

data_layer.rationale: No data storage details disclosed. The scope mentions 'securely collect, analyze, and deliver actionable insights' but no database, backup, or data management details.

security_posture.rationale: ISO 27001 certification pursuit indicates security commitment, but no specific security tools, practices, or controls are described in this document.

bcdr_readiness.rationale: No BCDR information disclosed. No RTO/RPO, backup strategy, or disaster recovery plans mentioned.

vendor_diversity.rationale: No vendors disclosed beyond the certification body. Cannot assess vendor diversity or concentration risk.

overall.rationale: This PDF is a Certification Agreement Form, not the actual ISO 27001 audit report. It contains essentially zero technical detail. The only useful information is the ISMS scope description confirming Soolv is a cloud-based talent intelligence platform. A proper tech due diligence assessment is not possible from this document alone.

red_flags: Document is only 7 pages — flagged as potentially incomplete report (below 10-page threshold)
This is a Certification Agreement Form, NOT the actual ISO 27001 audit report or certificate. No audit findings, controls, or technical details are present.

Auditor is Gradient Certification Inc. accredited by UAF (United Accreditation Foundation) — UAF is not an IAF MLA signatory, which raises questions about the international recognition of this certification
No Statement of Applicability (SoA) included despite being referenced as Version 1.0
Zero technical infrastructure details disclosed — impossible to assess security posture from this document
yellow_flags: ISO 27001 scope is very broadly defined, covering 'core business functions' including IT Infrastructure, HR, Physical Security, Legal & Compliance, and Administrative Operations — broad scope with only 9 total audit mandays may indicate shallow audit coverage
No website, system description, or infrastructure provider populated in metadata — limited public information available about the company
Certification date of 8/18/2025 is very recent; no prior certification history evident
green_flags: Company is pursuing ISO 27001 certification, indicating baseline security awareness and commitment
ISMS scope explicitly includes design, engineering, and maintenance of proprietary technology and data processing infrastructure
Scope covers critical support functions including IT Infrastructure Management, Human Resources, Physical Security, Legal & Compliance
key_observations: This document should NOT be treated as a completed ISO 27001 audit report. It is the pre-audit Certification Agreement Form between Soolv AS and Gradient Certification Inc.
The actual ISO 27001 certificate and audit report (including the SoA with Annex A control applicability) would need to be obtained separately for meaningful tech due diligence.

Gradient Certification Inc. (Sheridan, Wyoming / Houston, Texas) uses UAF accreditation. UAF is not a member of IAF MLA, meaning this certification may not be recognized by IAF-accredited bodies internationally. This is a significant consideration for enterprise customers requiring mainstream ISO 27001 certification.
Soolv AS appears to be an early-stage Norwegian company in the talent intelligence / HR tech space, based in central Oslo.
The 9 total audit mandays across the full 3-year certification cycle is relatively light, suggesting a small organization.
